methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: AI pressure grows on Richmond's young workforce - Axios
signals.signal_reading: AI-driven workforce displacement pressure concentrated in Richmond's metro workforce reveals shallow adoption anxiety without evidence of distributed reskilling infrastructure to build deeper resilience across regions.

signals.title: EPA grant backs community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia - Virginia Tech News
signals.signal_reading: EPA-funded community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia represents grassroots capacity-building that could distribute deep skills beyond metro centers, though success depends on sustained local ownership versus one-off grants.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's formalized AI education partnership concentrates institutional resources and expertise in Richmond metro, potentially deepening the capital-hub advantage unless the program explicitly designs for knowledge transfer to underserved regions.

signals.title: Hampton Roads multiple listing service introduces AI tool to personalize home searches - The Virginian-Pilot
signals.signal_reading: Hampton Roads MLS deploying AI personalization tools demonstrates platform-delivered shallow adoption—users consume AI capabilities without building underlying competency, achieving broad distribution without depth.

signals.title: AI is here in Hampton Roads, and businesses and organizations are embracing it - The Virginian-Pilot
signals.signal_reading: Hampton Roads businesses embracing turnkey AI solutions signals distributed but shallow adoption through vendor platforms rather than locally-developed expertise, creating dependency on concentrated external capability.
